hero.title: The Venue
hero.description: Experience ideas worth spreading at the heart of Acharya College of Engineering.

locations.name: The Auditorium
locations.description: Where the magic happens. A state-of-the-art facility featuring perfect acoustics, dynamic lighting, and seating for over 1,200 attendees.

locations.name: Networking Plaza
locations.description: Open-air spaces for coffee and conversation.

transportation.title: Shuttle Bus
transportation.description: Dedicated TEDxACEEC shuttles run every 20 mins from the main city terminal starting at 8:00 AM.

transportation.title: Metro Rail
transportation.description: Take the Red Line to ACEEC Station. The campus is a brief 5-minute walk from the South Exit.

transportation.title: Car Parking
transportation.description: Free designated parking for attendees is available at Gate 4. VIP parking available at Gate 1.

address.full: Acharya Dr. Sarvepalli Radhakrishnan Road, Soladevanahalli, Bangalore, Karnataka 560107
